# Vendor Dependencies

## Web Awesome

- **Source:** https://webawesome.com
- **License:** https://webawesome.com/license
- **Copyright:** Fonticons, Inc.

Web Awesome is a UI component library used for the CImporter frontend.
These files are checked into the repo because the app has no package
manager — they are required at runtime for the UI to render.

Do not update these files without testing the CImporter UI thoroughly.
